title: cyphostemma cornigera
intro: Cyphostemma cornigera, also known as the horned maprouca or elephant's tusk, is a succulent plant species native to the tropical regions of Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and its extracts have been shown to exhibit antioxidant, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory activities. Cyphostemma cornigera can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine and modern pharmaceutical applications.
